title: marketing — kill switches
description: Operational kill switches distinct from the tier-based `features.json` gates. These are for emergency-off / staged rollout / per-tenant ops interventions. Every flag is ON in normal production; off flips are ops decisions.

flags.description: Master toggle for the capture path. Off = MarketingEventCapturer no-ops. Emergency-only (used during DB migrations of marketing_events).

Master toggle for the dispatch path. Off = DispatchMarketingEventJob no-ops (events pile up in status='pending'). Emergency-only if a widespread provider issue is causing thundering herd on the queue.
Off = skip the re-check-at-dispatch consent gate (trusts the capture-time snapshot only). Documented drift risk — revocations between capture and dispatch won't suppress. Test envs only.
Off = CircuitBreakerGate always allows. Every failure counts against the threshold but the breaker never opens. Used to force-through dispatches during a provider recovery test.
Off = RateLimitGate always allows. Trust the provider's own 429 handling. Used when tenant + provider rate limits are misconfigured.
Off = RetryFailedDeliveriesJob does not enqueue new attempts. Failed deliveries stay failed until manual replay. Used during queue-worker debugging.
Off = MarketingRoasReportReadyNotification + high-failure-rate alerts + consent-suppression-spike alerts all no-op. Used when notifications module is degraded to avoid backing up its queue.
Off = ReconcileMarketingEventStatusJob skips. Only flip off for maintenance windows.
Per-provider kill switch. Off = Meta CAPI dispatches skip. Used when Meta CAPI is announced-degraded.
Per-provider kill switch. Off = Google Ads dispatches skip.
Off = marketing_deliveries.request_payload stored in plaintext. NEVER flip off in production (compliance violation).
Off = marketing_provider_configs.config stored in plaintext. NEVER flip off in production (compliance violation — credentials in plaintext).
